seoTitle: Coomba Bay vs Coomba Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coomba Bay and Coomba Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Coomba Bay vs Coomba Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coomba Bay and Coomba Park.
heading: Coomba Bay vs Coomba Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coomba Bay, New South Wales and Coomba Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coomba Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Coomba Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coomba Bay or Coomba Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coomba Bay has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Coomba Park scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coomba Bay scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Coomba Park scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coomba Bay or Coomba Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coomba Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
